display_text: Troll Warlord Aghanim's Scepter: Whirling Axes (Melee) dispels Troll Warlord, reducing cooldown and mana cost. This upgrade counters debuffs with a Basic Dispel, allowing Troll to maintain combat effectiveness against slows, stuns, and other control effects.
search_text: Troll Warlord Aghanim Scepter anti-disable dispel basic buff removal mana cost reduction

display_text: Troll Warlord Aghanim's Shard: Grants Troll a chance to fire additional ranged attacks based on Fervor stacks. This transforms Troll into a more versatile damage dealer, countering kiting and high-mobility heroes by ensuring consistent ranged damage application.
search_text: Troll Warlord Aghanim Shard ranged attack fervor stacks anti-kite mobility counter
